title: Halogen compounds
summary: 9701 A Level halogen compounds — halogenoarenes, reactivity, and synthesis routes.
learningObjectives: Explain low reactivity of aryl halides.
Evaluate environmental impact of halogenated organics.

simpleExplanation.title: C–X on sp³ vs sp²
simpleExplanation.summary: Halogenoarenes have strong C–X bonds and resist nucleophilic substitution under mild conditions.
steps: Halogenoarenes: need high T, pressure, or catalyst.
CFCs and halogenated pesticides — environmental concerns.
Electrophilic substitution installs halogen on ring.

sections.content: **Halogen compounds** (31.1) at A Level contrasts **aliphatic vs aromatic** reactivity — a favourite comparison question.
